text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's all my stretches done! On to
training...

text_block_list.name: Girl on Bench A
text_block_list.text:
It was wonderful! He was so quick to approach
me!

text_block_list.name: Girl on Bench B
text_block_list.text: Wow, he really loves you! And then?!

text_block_list.name: Girl on Bench A
text_block_list.text:
And then... he kissed me on the cheek... and then
on the lips! Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Are they talking about... r-romance?! I can't
believe they're saying stuff like that out loud...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe I'll listen to just a little more before
training!

text_block_list.name: Girl on Bench A
text_block_list.text:
So what do you think? Isn't my new puppy just the
cutest? ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl on Bench B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Listening to you talk about him makes me so jealous! I want a doggy too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: They were talking about a dog.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If that were a person... it would've been a pretty
great story!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Especially the part in the beginning about him
crawling into her bed in the morning!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... That was great. Now, where was I—
